title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed APIs as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend with LangChain abstractions.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model manager, and RAG.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + Chroma.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses Ollama models for local inline completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building local pipelines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, model management, and reactive streaming.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat wrapper (Python) with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and multi-model switch.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama including async HTTP, streaming, and model management procedures.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with dependency injection helpers and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfiles for fine-tuned, code, multilingual, and role-playing models.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (Windows/Mac/Linux) with tray icon and auto-launch.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI commands for summarization, translation, and continuation.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server (Go) that streams Ollama responses into threads with per-channel model overrides.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that wraps Ollama for multi-user chat history and token-usage tracking.
